---
name: Lesson / hint improvement
about: A clearer proof, a better trace, an extra worked example, or a hint that should be gentler
title: "[lesson] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Where** (module / section, e.g. "Module 02, §3 harmonic numbers"):

**What could be clearer**
<!-- The passage, proof, hint, or example, and what trips a reader up. -->

**Suggested improvement**
<!-- Your proposed wording, a missing step, a better example — prose is welcome. -->

<!--
The lessons must stay self-contained (a reader without the books can finish the
module) and keep their three sections: "why it's done this way", "in the real
world", "proof techniques you practiced". See CONVENTIONS.md.
